title: Communication rehearsal

steps.title: Goal
steps.body: What outcome would be respectful and realistic?

steps.title: Feel and need
steps.body: Write one sentence for what you feel and one for what you need.

steps.title: Boundary or request
steps.body: Write the request without threats or manipulation.

steps.title: Rehearsal script
steps.body: Combine the pieces into a short script.

completionPrompt: A good script is clear, respectful, and does not try to control the other person.
